validations.description: At least one intake artifact must exist
Intake must not contain [REJECTED] marker
Intake must not have FAIL status in frontmatter
At least one intake artifact must exist
Research directory must exist
Research directory must contain minimum number of markdown files based on depth mode
Source-tracking file (CITATIONS.md or CLAIMS.md) must contain minimum sources based on depth mode
6-layer visual essay specification
Spec must contain all 6 layer headings
Spec should not contain [DRAFT] marker (configurable)
Subject-derived design research report with color palette, typography, animation philosophy
Design research should cover Color, Typography, and Animation (warning if missing)
At least one intake artifact must exist
Design research report (must exist and be reconciled)
Design research must not contain [UNRECONCILED] marker
Design research must not flag aesthetic collisions with other essays
Reconciliation audit must not have FAIL status in frontmatter
validations.reason: File not found — cannot verify content (use missing_ok: true to skip)

attempts.failure_reason: None of required files exist: {artifact_path}/research/G4.1-DESIGN-RECONCILIATION.md, {artifact_path}/G4.1-DESIGN-RECONCILIATION.md; Found forbidden pattern: status: FAIL

validations.description: At least one intake artifact must exist
Design research report (must exist and be reconciled)
Design research must not contain [UNRECONCILED] marker
Design research must not flag aesthetic collisions with other essays
Reconciliation audit must not have FAIL status in frontmatter
At least one intake artifact must exist
Image audit must not contain unlicensed assets
Image audit should not have pending sourcing tasks
Image audit must not have FAIL status in frontmatter
images.ts must exist with verified Wikimedia Commons direct URLs (not file page URLs)
images.ts must NOT contain thumbnail URLs (/commons/thumb/) — use direct image URLs only
images.ts must contain at least one properly-hashed Wikimedia Commons direct URL (format: /commons/{hash1}/{hash2}/filename.ext)
images.ts must contain at least 5 verified direct image URLs (photorealistic essays require substantial photography)
All image URLs in images.ts must return HTTP 2xx — verifies URLs are not broken (404), not thumbnail redirects, and not file-page HTML
Technology tier assignment for each planned visualization
At least one visualization must be assigned Tier 1 or higher
Technology tier assignment for each planned visualization
At least one visualization must be assigned Tier 1 or higher
TypeScript image data with all URLs pointing to images.esy.com
No hotlinked Wikimedia URLs — all images must be on images.esy.com
No hotlinked Library of Congress URLs — all images must be on images.esy.com
images.ts must contain R2-hosted URLs (images.esy.com) and be typed as const
At least 5 R2-hosted image URLs must be present (photorealistic essays require substantial photography)
All R2-hosted image URLs must return HTTP 2xx — verifies upload completed successfully
Next.js page with metadata, ArtifactDetailWrapper, and default export
page.tsx must contain a default export and metadata definition
page.tsx MUST import and use ArtifactDetailWrapper with ESSAY_META (visual-essay-engineering-standard.md §2, Red Lines)
page.tsx MUST import ArtifactDetailWrapper from @/components/ArtifactDetail
page.tsx should not contain TODO markers (indicates incomplete implementation)
Client component must NOT contain emoji characters — use SVG icons or CSS shapes instead

Client component must NOT contain raw Unicode escape sequences (\uXXXX) in JSX text content — they render as literal text, not as the intended character. Wrap in JavaScript expressions ({"\u0113"}) or use actual UTF-8 characters (ē) instead. See: JSX text nodes do not process JS string escape sequences.
Client component must import from ./images (images.ts) — all external image URLs must be centralized in the images file, not hardcoded inline
Client component must contain at least 3 elements — photorealistic essays require substantial photography
Client component must contain a Sources/Bibliography section — every essay requires source attribution at the conclusion
Per-visualization technology audit with scores
Client component or its visualization imports must reference at least one visualization library or Canvas API
No div-width-percentage bar charts in data-encoding visualizations
At least one intake artifact must exist
Design research must still exist (design source of truth)
Design fidelity audit must not have FAIL status in frontmatter
Frontmatter must indicate non-FAIL status with zero blocking issues
At least one intake artifact must exist
Client component must contain @diagram-contract blocks for every visualization function
Client component MUST contain at least one @diagram-contract block per diagram-code-contract.md standard
Diagram-code reconciliation must not have FAIL status
Diagram-code reconciliation frontmatter status must not be FAIL
At least one intake artifact must exist
Bibliography audit must not have FAIL status in frontmatter
Bibliography audit must not report overall failure
Frontmatter status must not be FAIL
Client component must import and render the SOURCES data — the bibliography section must exist in the actual rendered output, not just the audit document
Client component must import and render IMAGE_CREDITS data — image attribution must appear in the actual rendered output
Client component must contain bibliography-related section markers (sources, bibliography, works cited, or further reading)
At least one intake artifact must exist
Citation audit must not have FAIL status in frontmatter
Citation audit must not have Rejected certification
Frontmatter status must not be FAIL (parsed from YAML, not string match)
At least one intake artifact must exist
Prose quality audit must not have FAIL status
Frontmatter status must not be FAIL

validations.regex: (\bdelve\b|\btapestry\b|\bunlock the secrets\b|\bin today's world\b|\blet's dive\b|\bfascinating journey\b|\bit's important to note\b|\bIn conclusion\b)
validations.description: Client component should not contain common AI slop phrases (delve, tapestry, unlock the secrets, etc.)
Client component must NOT contain emoji characters
At least one intake artifact must exist
Scroll certification must not have FAIL status in frontmatter
Scroll certification must not report overall failure
Frontmatter status must not be FAIL (parsed from YAML)
Client component must reference at least 3 images from the IMAGES constant — scroll certification requires visual content actually renders
Client component must use lazy loading on images (loading='lazy') for scroll performance
At least one intake artifact must exist
Publication certification must not have FAIL status in frontmatter
Publication certification must not be NO-GO
Frontmatter status must not be FAIL (parsed from YAML)
PUBLICATION GATE: Client component must import SOURCES and IMAGE_CREDITS — bibliography and image attribution must be present in the shipped code
PUBLICATION GATE: Client component must reference at least 5 images from the IMAGES constant — photorealistic essays require substantial photography
PUBLICATION GATE: images.ts must contain R2-hosted URLs (images.esy.com) — hotlinking external URLs is prohibited
PUBLICATION GATE: images.ts must not contain hotlinked Wikimedia URLs — all images must be self-hosted on R2
PUBLICATION GATE: Spot-check that R2 image URLs are reachable (HTTP 2xx) — final defense against broken images shipping to production
At least one intake artifact must exist
Publication approval must not contain REJECTED
Publication approval must not have FAIL status in frontmatter
Final verification: page.tsx MUST use ArtifactDetailWrapper at publication time (visual-essay-engineering-standard.md §Red Lines)
Frontmatter status must not be FAIL (parsed from YAML)
